members.name: Base64ToRaw
members.summary: Returns a decoded [PackedByteArray] corresponding to the Base64-encoded string [param base64_str].

members.name: Base64ToUtf8
members.summary: Returns a decoded string corresponding to the Base64-encoded string [param base64_str].

members.name: Base64ToVariant
members.signature: public Variant Base64ToVariant(String base64Str, bool allowObjects)
members.summary: Returns a decoded [Variant] corresponding to the Base64-encoded string [param base64_str]. If [param allow_objects] is [code]true[/code], decoding objects is allowed. Internally, this uses the same decoding mechanism as the [method @GlobalScope.bytes_to_var] method. [b]Warning:[/b] Deserialized objects can contain code which gets executed. Do not use this option if the serialized object comes from untrusted sources to avoid potential security threats such as remote code execution.

members.name: RawToBase64
members.summary: Returns a Base64-encoded string of a given [PackedByteArray].

members.name: Utf8ToBase64
members.summary: Returns a Base64-encoded string of the UTF-8 string [param utf8_str].

members.name: VariantToBase64
members.signature: public String VariantToBase64(Variant variant, bool fullObjects)
members.summary: Returns a Base64-encoded string of the [Variant] [param variant]. If [param full_objects] is [code]true[/code], encoding objects is allowed (and can potentially include code). Internally, this uses the same encoding mechanism as the [method @GlobalScope.var_to_bytes] method.
